use_cases: Displaying status labels like 'New', 'Featured', or 'Beta' on cards
Showing category tags and metadata on content cards
Indicating item states such as Active, Inactive, or Pending
Highlighting notification counts or alerts in navigation
Categorizing and labeling content items in grids or lists
ai_summary: A versatile badge component with four style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) built with class-variance-authority. Features inline-flex layout with rounded borders, hover state transitions, and focus ring accessibility. Part of the Shadcn UI component system, designed to display status labels, tags, and metadata within card layouts or as standalone inline indicators.
